brand-story-img.query: Velmora began with a simple question: why does fine jewelry feel like it belongs in a box? We make demi-fine pieces — 18K gold plated over a solid brass core — designed to be worn on a Tuesday, not just a wedding. Jewelry that earns its place in your everyday. editorial portrait of founder at workbench warm light
